title: Documentation
description: Generate comprehensive technical documentation for your solution
prompt: Generate comprehensive technical documentation with clear headings, component descriptions, and technical details. Structure the output with sections: Overview, Components, Data Model, Integrations, and Summary.

title: Diagrams
description: Generate a custom diagram for your solution
prompt: Generate a specified diagram for the user from the given additional prompt, output the file in mermaid. Focus on creating clear, well-structured mermaid diagrams. Include flowcharts for processes, entity relationship diagrams for data models, and sequence diagrams for interactions where appropriate. Output all diagrams as fenced mermaid code blocks. Minimise prose — let the diagrams do the work.
